query: ( "heat warning system" OR "heat alert system" OR "extreme heat alert" OR "heat health action plan" OR "heat emergency response" OR "weather forecast intervention" OR "forecast-based financing" OR "anticipatory action" OR "heat early warning" OR "early warning system" ) AND ( "cooling center" OR "cooling centre" OR "heat refuge" OR "heat action plan" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat wave" OR "heatwave" OR "hot weather" ) AND ( "heat-related mortality" OR "heat-related morbidity" OR "temperature mortality" OR "cardiovascular hospitalization" OR "emergency department visits" OR "excess mortality" OR "heat-related illness" OR "heat stroke" OR "heat exhaustion" OR "heat stress disorder" ) AND ( "causal inference" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "interrupted time series" OR "natural experiment" OR "instrumental variable" OR "heat wave epidemiology" OR "counterfactual" OR "propensity score" OR "synthetic control" )
